title: Fast wakeup and data transmission methods using informative wakeup signals for wireless communications, and apparatuses, systems, and non-transitory computer-readable storage devices employing same
abstract: A method has the steps of: transmitting a wakeup signal to a communication node in reduced power consumption for wireless communication related activities. The wakeup signal is for instructing the communication node to perform one or more tasks. The wakeup signal has an informative portion. The informative portion has control information for the one or more tasks. In some embodiments, the one or more tasks include a task of wakeup for communication, a task of wakeup for sensing, a task of wakeup for measurement, a task of wakeup for link adaption, or a combination thereof.
